subject: CriticsвҖҷ Summer Book Picks!
body: This week вҖ“ our critics tell us what they are excited to read this summer, the International Booker prize, API reads and Kennedy Ryan View this email online May 27, 2023by Meghan Collins Sullivan CriticsвҖҷ Summer Book Picks! Islenia Mil for NPRMemorial Day is often considered the unofficial start to summer. Many kids are entering the last weeks of school, pools start to open, and vacations from work are on the horizon. It's a time of the year that many associate with a somewhat slower pace affording, maybe, a little more free time to read. We asked some of our regular book critics what soon-to-be-published titles they are most looking forward to reading this summer. Here's what they said. Newsletter continues after sponsor message Meghan Collins Sullivan/NPRMay is also Asian American and Pacific Islander Heritage Month. NPRвҖҷs Malaka Gharib has some great new books by Filipino authors for you to check out -- ranging from a noir graphic novel to the latest from Gina Apostol. Earlier this week, the International Booker Prize was awarded to Bulgarian author Georgi Gospodinov and translator Angela Rodel for the novel Time Shelter, which imagines the "first clinic of the past," in which Alzheimer's patients can visit different time periods of their lives on different floors. You can read more about it here. David Parry/The Booker Prizes Hachette Book GroupRomance books all have one thing in common: A "Happily Ever After." With a mainstream publisher reissuing five of Kennedy RyanвҖҷs previously self-published titles starting this month, and a TV series based on another one of her books in development through Peacock, Ryan's high-emotional-stakes romances are poised to reach a wider audience. NPRвҖҷs Chloe Veltman has more here.DonвҖҷt forget to take a listen to NPRвҖҷs authors interviews on our Book of the Day podcast, too! This week weвҖҷll be talking with Keith Ellison, Emma Cline, Maggie Smith, Kwame Alexander and Brooke Kroeger. You can find us here. Enjoy the long weekend! Meghan Listen to your local NPR station. Visit NPR.org to hear live radio from KUNC (edit station). What do you think of today's email? We'd love to hear your thoughts, questions and feedback: books@npr.org Enjoying this newsletter? Forward to a friend! They can sign up here. Looking for more great content?Check out all of our newsletter offerings вҖ” including Music, Pop Culture, Code Switch and more! subject: [UAI] Job Opening at BISC Program, UCB;
body: ********************************************************************* Berkeley Initiative in Soft Computing (BISC) ********************************************************************* ********************************************************************* Please read the qualification for Jobs before you Apply. Incomplete applications will not be considered for review. The current opening positions at BISC are: ------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Software Developer and R&D for the BISC-DSS (Decision Support System) [Ref. Dr. Nikravesh, BISC-DSS and Web-Based DSS) -- Software Developer and R&D for the BISC - Q&A System (Question & Answering System)[Ref. Prof. Zadeh's Recent work; From Search Engine to Question Answering System] For more information about BISC-DSS and Q&A System please visit BISC website. ========================================================= ********************************************************** Applicant are invited for several postdoctoral/ research professional positions at BISC Program-University of California, Berkeley. You'll enjoy challenging projects and a unique work environment at BISC Program. The BISC program carry out world class research and advanced development activities in area of Soft Computing and Artificial Intelligence. Research teams within BISC Program-UCB take part in international R&D programmes to ensure that the research remains leading edge and relevant to the BISC's strategic objectives. BISC Program have been successfully exploiting results of its research in the sponsors companies' project creating significant values for our partners. The successful candidates will have the opportunity to be involved in defining new research field/directions and will take an active role in carrying out R&D activities in an area that will be of significant importance for BISC future. Required Qualifications and skills : ============================ We are seeking recognized researchers to play active roles in BISC program. - --They should have PhD or equivalent degree in areas such as computer science and/or Engineering field, artificial intelligence, and/or soft computing with emphasis to one or more of the following 1) the Search Engine and Query, 2) Question-Answering System, 3) Decision Support Systems, Time Series Analysis/Signal Processing. - -- They must have good software engineering skills and practical experience in Internet based technology and software development, Java, C++ and systems programming. - -- They should have an excellent publication record track in refereed journals and good communication skills. Salary: Depends on Experience and Qualification PostDocs: $40,512-$55,668 Research Positions: $53,900-$71,400 Others: Open Date for Accepting Applications: August 2004 Closing Date: Nov. 2004 Review process Begins: September 2004 Starting Date: Oct. 2004-Jan 2005 Please forward your CV and supporting information including copy of three published papers in refereed journals (relevant to the position and the field that you are applying for), and cover letter to: M. Nikravesh BISC Associate Director 199MF Cory Hall EECS Department University of Calaifornia-Berkeley Berkeley, CA 94720 Or Email electronic copy to: gmoizjagn@eecs.berkeley.edu in Subject (Applying for Position at BISC Program) ================================================ ================================================ ****************************************************** -- How to Join BISC Program: --------------------------------- http://www-bisc.cs.berkeley.edu/BISCProgram/Sponsors.htm ----------------------------------------------------------------- **************************************************** -- BISC Associate Program ------------------------------- http://www-bisc.cs.berkeley.edu/BISCProgram/Associate.htm ----------------------------------------------------------------- **************************************************** -------------------------------------------------------------------- If you ever want to remove yourself from this mailing list, you can send mail to with the following command in the body of your email message: unsubscribe bisc-group or from another account, unsubscribe bisc-group

subject: Amazon request: Please follow the Member Verification Procedure!
body: Place or Update Credit Card on File Dear Amazon Customer ,This is your final warning about the safety of your Amazon account. If you do not update your billing informations your access on Amazon features will be restricted and the user deleted. This might be due to either following reasons: - A recent change in your personal information (i.e. change of address) - Submiting invalid information during the initial sign up process. - An inability to accurately verify your selected option of payment due an internal error within our processors. body: We are reaching out for guidance on securing medical data within a WordPress healthcare site. Our healthcare organization needs to ensure that our website is compliant with relevant regulations as we handle sensitive patient information. Could you provide us with recommendations for plugins, themes, and security practices to secure our WordPress site? Additionally, we are interested in understanding specific WordPress features that can help maintain the confidentiality of patient data.

To protect the security of your account, Armed Forces Bank employs some of the most advanced security systems in the world and our anti-fraud teams regularly screen the Armed Forces Bank system for unusual activity. body: On Sunday 10 February 2008 04:37, Eberhard Roloff wrote: > Doug McGarrett wrote: > > Does anyone have a suggestion for the above referenced machine, that > > installs without any hassle, special drivers, or anything else, to SuSE > > 9.3? It should be low cost, hopefully. I don't want to look for > > repositories, special RPMs, I want the system to recognize and install > > it, period. I have had it with things that are supposed to work, but > > don't. > > > > Thanx--doug > > > > Blessed are the peacemakers ... for they shall be shot at from both > > sides. --A.M. Greeley > > HP is the way to go for this. Their Linux support is outstanding and the > functionality is very close to "that other OS". > > You simply do not have to worry, whether it will work. > > But: > Be sure to have a detailed look at the "supported models" list, BEFORE > you buy, though. > http://hplip.sourceforge.net/supported_devices/index.html > > Furthermore, as you are still on SuSE 9.3, most probably, you will have > to do a manual installation. > http://hplip.sourceforge.net/install/index.html > > Imho, this is as close as you will get in regard to... > > ..."I don't want to look for repositories, > special RPMs, I want the system to recognize and install it, period." > > Kind regards > Eberhard I was told several months ago that hplip does not work with systems below 10.0. Is this true or not? And if not true, how can I determine what value of hplip might be on the machine, if any? --doug Blessed are the peacemakers ... for they shall be shot at from both sides. --A.M. subject: CORNELL INTERNSHIP RESEARCH
body:
Remote Student Research Assistant Opportunity at Cornell University

Cornell University is currently seeking student research assistants to support faculty research remotely. This opportunity is open to students from all departments, and participants will receive a weekly stipend of $400.

About the Research
Our department fosters a dynamic and collaborative research environment, addressing critical challenges in chemical, biological, and environmental engineering. Our interdisciplinary work spans computational modeling, experimental in vitro and in vivo systems, clinical research, and field studies.

Eligibility & Application
All currently enrolled Cornell students are encouraged to apply. Research tasks are designed to be completed remotely.

To apply, please send an email to Gary Koretzky, Interim Vice Provost for Research at interimvpr.cornell.edu@gmail.com with the following information:

Full Name

Year of Study

Department

Alternate Email Address

Important: Use вҖңCornell UniversityвҖқ as the subject line of your email. Applications will be reviewed on a first-come, first-served basis due to limited availability.

We look forward to your application.

Sincerely,
The Remote Internship Team
Cornell University

Dear Subscriber,

Time flies! It's hard to believe, but we are just over 100 days away from the Free Cities Foundation's highly anticipated Liberty in Our Lifetime [https://libertyinourlifetime.org/] conference, taking place from November 1-3. Now is the perfect time to start planning your trip to be part of this unforgettable weekend filled with inspiring talks and quality networking activities in the heart of historic Prague.
[https://xmjhp.mjt.lu/img2/xmjhp/dd5824e2-ef4e-484c-bb54-d88230329b0c/content]
Attendees networking at our 2023 conference
In recent years, more than a dozen zones aspiring to become Free Cities have been established worldwide. These zones are dedicated to protecting individual liberties and fostering a new kind of relationship between citizens and their governments. The Liberty in Our Lifetime conference is the premier annual gathering where representatives of Free City projects from around the globe come together to showcase their achievements and the opportunities they can offer to you and your family.

In addition to featuring important updates from flagship projects such as Ciudad MorazГЎn, PrГіspera, Montelibero and Sark, this year will also include first-time presentations from new and promising projects in Africa and the Caribbean.
[https://xmjhp.mjt.lu/img2/xmjhp/96134a22-866f-4348-9e1e-12d13a9cc265/content]
Welcome drinks at Liberty in Our Lifetime 2023
Online tickets now available

While we encourage as many of you as possible to join us in Prague, we understand that this may not be possible for everyone. ThatвҖҷs why we also offer online tickets [https://libertyinourlifetime.org/product/liberty-in-our-lifetime-2024-online-ticket/], allowing you to join our conference livestream, ask questions, and receive talk recordings from the comfort of your own home. For more information about our speakers, event details, and to purchase your tickets, please visit our official conference website [https://libertyinourlifetime.org/].

We look forward to seeing you in November.

Best regards,

The Free Cities Foundation Team
With thanks to our conference sponsors:

[https://tipolis.com/]

[https://staatenlos.ch/]

[]
You have received this email because you are subscribed to the Liberty in Our Lifetime newsletter. If you no longer want to receive updates about the Liberty in Our Lifetime conference, click the link to unsubscribe http://xmjhp.mjt.lu/unsub2?hl=en&m=AVcAAEfwI4kAAc4HzSIAAAAJYbwAAYCspv0AnsKdAA8g9gBml9hNIdDxmrzwRueX9uIInDSFgwAO67Y&b=2c53868b&e=01d18ed2&x=UqvGKt8IMEpbnP8m5kaXDOAYYQS4-2MqoVzBYVNf3Gw.
Free Cities Foundation, 30 North Gould Street, Suite R, Sheridan, WY 82801

subject: Fw: A BUSINESS/INVESTMENT COLLABORATION OPPORTUNITY!!
body:
________________________________
De: David Bongo Bongani <bhs@dshw.co.kr>
Enviado: quarta-feira, 22 de fevereiro de 2023 17:57
Para: Recipients <bhs@dshw.co.kr>
Assunto: A BUSINESS/INVESTMENT COLLABORATION OPPORTUNITY!!

A BUSINESS/INVESTMENT COLLABORATION OPPORTUNITY

Attention: CEO/DIRECTOR,

I am writing based on the information about your e-mail which I got from the foreign office of South African Chamber of Commerce

Allow me this opportunity to introduce myself and the purpose of this proposal. I am Dr Bongani David Bongo, Member of Contract and Business Forum, which is a team for a rural community consortium here in South Africa formed for the sole purpose of bidding for a lucrative infrastructural project from the current government here in South Africa.

I am reaching you in my private capacity, regarding various opportunities in infrastructural development that we both can benefit immensely from. A brief background of myself, I do belong to the ruling party here in South Africa's current democratic government. I am an active member in good standing till date for more than thirty years.

Due to my activism and close connection to top members of the governing party, some of us happen to have privileges to lucrative contracts from the government on infrastructural development through a private rural community consortium, formed as a vehicle for this purpose. I am a full-time politician and also a business executive.

My reason for contacting you, is to solicit your candid assistance in collaborating with me through this consortium as a foreign company sub-contractor, to enable the facilitation of payment release of some lucrative contracts awarded to us and which has also been executed. These executed contracts were over invoiced during the bidding and award process, through the assistance of our inside contacts at the Chief Procurement Officer's office at national treasury, who is a comrade.

Full details of this opportunity will be unfolded to you, including the amounts involved once I have a positive indication of your willingness to collaborate with me through our consortium in facilitating the payment release.

My assurance to you, is that every of your involvement with me on this collaboration, will be transparent and 100% risk free I am a member of the ruling party, as all we need to do is have your company as a foreign sub-contracting partner company to our consortium to legitimize the total contract amount which will include the over invoiced portion.

Kindly do let me know of your willingness to collaborate with me, by a reply email to this effect.

Sincerely Yours

Dr Bongani David Bongo
Member of Contract and Business Forum
RE: CONTRACT PARTNERSHIP/RELATIONSHIP
